violations.text: The cutting boards in the ( ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
The ceiling tile above the ice machine is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2026

The two door fridge in the kitchen was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken 50DF, and Feta cheese 50DF was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen and preparation area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The blade to the can opener is rusted. This is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Blade must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The plumbing for the water pressure system at the main dishwasher area observed leaking at the time of the inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils at the main dishwasher were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Meatballs was observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit in the hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated during time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Soup located in the walk-in refrigerator unit #2 was observed date exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat foods. Food item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm) at the buckets. A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. The sanitizer buckets were emptied and refilled with a sanitizer at the proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen and preparation area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
The blade to the can opener is rusted. This is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Blade must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The plumbing for the water pressure system at the main dishwasher area observed leaking at the time of the inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
